task_completion.description: Verify the query is named 'Open Bugs Snapshot' and saved in the 'Shared Queries' folder.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the Azure DevOps Queries page, the query 'Open Bugs Snapshot' should be visible under the 'Shared Queries' folder in the left sidebar or breadcrumb navigation.

task_completion.description: Verify the query filters for Work Item Type = Bug.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the query editor view, there should be a filter clause where 'Work Item Type' is set to '=' 'Bug'.

task_completion.description: Verify the query filters for active states (not Closed or Removed).
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the query editor view, there should be a filter clause for 'State' that either uses '<>' (Not Equals) for 'Closed' and 'Removed', or uses 'In' (or multiple '=' clauses) for 'New', 'Active', and 'Committed'.

task_completion.description: Verify a Pie Chart widget is added to the 'TailwindTraders Team' dashboard.
task_completion.visual_evidence: On the Dashboards page for 'TailwindTraders Team', a new Pie Chart widget should be visible on the canvas.

task_completion.description: Verify the Pie Chart is configured to use the 'Open Bugs Snapshot' query.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the widget configuration sidebar for the Pie Chart, the 'Query' dropdown/selection must be set to 'Open Bugs Snapshot'.

task_completion.description: Verify the Pie Chart is grouped by 'Assigned To'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the widget configuration sidebar for the Pie Chart, the 'Group by' dropdown must be set to 'Assigned To'.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used the Azure DevOps web interface to complete the task.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the Azure DevOps portal in a web browser, rather than terminal commands, API scripts, or text editors.

integrity.description: Verify the query was built using the visual query editor.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the agent interacting with the query editor interface, adding clauses via dropdowns.

integrity.description: Verify the dashboard widget was configured via the UI.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the dashboard in edit mode with the widget configuration sidebar open on the right side of the screen.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Project Name: TailwindTraders. Query Name: 'Open Bugs Snapshot'. Query Folder: 'Shared Queries'. Dashboard Name: 'TailwindTraders Team'. Chart Type: 'Pie'. Group By: 'System.AssignedTo' (displayed in the UI as 'Assigned To').
